response.overview: Created as his HKU graduation project, Kay Hilman’s animated short film, NOXIOUS, is a haunting exploration of a world reclaimed by nature. Created in Blender with a hand-drawn illustrative style, it imagines a impressive but terrifying new lifeform that has decided to claim our planet for itself. The music and sound design by Mikael Umarov helps set the mood.
response.title: NOXIOUS
